title: Golden Apple Count (Gapple Counter)
description: Shows the amount of golden apples someone has, as well as a colored border around it. Useful for netherite potion and op/sword with gapples.
body:
## Showcase
![Madoka holding 10 golden apples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6wpEPGSq/images/6418695b99786f7dddc64a03ffe55008936e6548.png)

## Description
This texture pack shows you the amount of golden apples is in the stack. It works on the ground, in guis, and in other people's hands. It is recommended to use this pack if you want to play any gamemode that you have to pay attention to how many gaps the other player has, like UHC, NethOP, etc. In addition to there being a count on the gaps, there is also a colored outline to easily tell at a glance how big the stack is.

## How to Use
1. Download and apply the pack as normal
2. If you are on Minecraft versions 1.21.3 or lower, then you will have to use [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home), or alternatives.
3. If you are on Minecraft versions 1.21.4 or higher, then you can use the pack without installing any additional mods.
